name: Easy San Francisco Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 package Green Giant American-Mixtures San Francisco-Style Frozen Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add beef; cook and stir until no longer pink.
2. In a small bowl, combine jelly, cornstarch, and mustard; blend well. Stir the mixture into the meat.
3. Add frozen vegetables to the meat. Cover and simmer for 5-7 minutes until vegetables are crisp-tender, stirring frequently.
4. Serve over rice, if desired.
Preparation time: 20 minutes.
TIP: If currant jelly is not available, 1/2 cup apple jelly and 3 tablespoons lemon juice may be substituted.
